name: Omon.msftmrhompa
title: Ocean Meridional Overturning Mass Streamfunction Due to Parameterized Mesoscale Advection
description: CMIP5 called this "due to Bolus Advection".  Name change respects the more general physics of the mesoscale parameterizations.
processing note: Function of latitude, rho, basin. For a model with a cartesian latxlon grid, this is the same as the "Ocean Y Overturning Mass Streamfunction" (msftyrhompa), which should in this case be omitted.  For other models, this transport should be approximated as the transport across zig-zag paths corresponding to latitudes with spacing between latitudes appropriate to the model's resolution. CHANGE SINCE CMIP6 in Cell Methods - CMIP6:longitude: sum (comment: basin sum [along zig-zag grid path]) depth: sum time: mean CMIP7:depth: longitude: sum where sea (along a zig-zag grid path spanning a basin)  time: mean,
